full_text:
S137_pOme

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 4.76 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 2.04 x 106 /mL

Viability: 42.8%

Average size: 8.2 um

2). Total cells: 4.5 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 1.63 x 106 /mL

Viability: 36%

Average size: 7.9 um

Average of two counts: 4.6 x 106 /mL * 2 mL > 9.2 x 106 /mL

Total cell count: 9.2 x 106 / ml

Due to low cell count , no cells were cultured for RNA/DNA extraction

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

8 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 48 wells

48 wells x 40 µl = 1920 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 3.84*E6 cells

→ take 105 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.84*E6 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 1598 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omentum gel mix as below.

→ make 1920 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorf

cells in medium → 1598 ul

ome-gel → 272 µl

aprotinin → 6 µl

thrombin → 6 µl

Mix well and divide into two 1.5 ml tubes each 941 ul

fibrinogen to each tube one by one → 18.8 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

B) 96-well U plate

8 conditions x 6 wells/condition= 48 wells

48 wells x 8 µl = 384 µl → make 400 µl

2000 cells/µl = 7.7*E5 cells

→ take 85 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.8*E5 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 332 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

cells in medium → 332

ome-gel → 56 µl

aprotinin → 1.2 µl

thrombin → 1.2 µl

fibrinogen → 8 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 25 uL to make up to 175 uL per well

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.0 *E6 cells for flow antibody staining

→ 0.5* E6 cells for flow unstained cells

Pellet the above cell suspension @400g, +4 for 6 min. Resuspend the pellet in 900ul of FACS buffer, proceed with the staining.

E) Sample for cryo

→ 4.5 x 106 cells were frozen in 1mL of stem cell banker per vial

Prepare:

Medium

needed

300 uL x 48 = 14.4 mL

150 uL x 48 uL = 7.2 mL

~ 30 mL

Omegel needed = 328 uL (STOCK 17.7 ug/mL)

aprotinin = 7.2 uL

thrombin = 7.2 uL

fibrinogen = 45.6 uL

FACS staining was performed for d0 pOme samples according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS staining buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization. In addition, d0 unstained cells of the same samples as well as new compensation was run at the same time.

Treatment was initiated on day 1.

Drug treatment conditions:

control

olaparib 20uM

olaparib 40uM

pembro 10ug/mL

pembro 50ug/mL

GSK STING agonist 0.1uM

GSK STING agonist 0.5uM

GSK STING agonist 1uM

Treatment plan:

Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug→

50 ul /well *6 for 48 wells + 25 ul / well*6 for 96 wells = 300 uL + 150 uL =450 uLà prepare 500 ul

Add 50 uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 48 wells

Add 25uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 96 wells

Fixation and processing for FACS on day 7

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | 7x concentrated | Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug per 500 uL | Volume of the culture medium
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.2 % | 1.4 % | 7uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 7 uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 40 uM | 280 ug / mL | 14 uL | 486 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 7 uL | 493 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 50 ug / mL | 350 ug/ ml | 35 uL | 465 uL
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.1 uM | 0.7 uM | 0.4 uL | 499.6 uL
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.5 uM | 3.5 uM | 1.8 uL | 498.2
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 1 uM | 7 uM | 3.5 uL | 496.5
